title: Deleting & updating files via API
excerpt:
Trying to find out if there is away to update a file that has been uploaded to a column. Is that possible? 
I looked into deleting the files but if I want to do that it appears I need to delete or clear out all the files…

posts.author: PMguy (Alan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Trying to find out if there is away to update a file that has been uploaded to a column. Is that possible?

I looked into deleting the files but if I want to do that it appears I need to delete or clear out all the files. Which I do not want to do. It won’t work for our workflow. (How to remove / delete file from item via API)

If I could update the file, then I’d be alright. But deleting them all is a no go.

Is there a way to update files?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @PMguy!

As of today there is no mutation for modifying an existent file. You can delete them but not modify them.

I hope that helps!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: PMguy (Alan)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any roadmap plan to change that?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @PMguy!

Nothing in the short term, no.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
